# Correct: orchestrate high-level workflows by composing small, testable, single-purpose functions
def handle_nightly_job():
    raw_data = extract_data("data.json")
    clean_data = transform_data(raw_data)
    load_to_database(clean_data)
    notify_administrators("Job Done")

def extract_data(path): pass
def transform_data(data): pass
def load_to_database(data): pass
def notify_administrators(msg): pass
